```js title=main.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./app.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) {
"use strict";
__webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {
  marker: () => (marker)
});
/* import */ var _shadow__rspack_import_0 = __webpack_require__("./shadow.js");
/* import */ var _shadow__rspack_import_0_default = /*#__PURE__*/__webpack_require__.n(_shadow__rspack_import_0);


const marker = 1;

// === Should be tree-shaken (truly pure) ===

// Collections with no args.
let unusedSet = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (new Set()));
let unusedMap = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (new Map()));
let unusedWeakMap = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (new WeakMap()));
let unusedWeakSet = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (new WeakSet()));

// Collections with explicit nullish are also fine (return empty collection).
let unusedNullSet = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (new Set(null)));
let unusedUndefMap = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (new Map(undefined)));

// TypedArrays with non-negative integer literal length.
let unusedTyped = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (new Uint8Array(16)));
let unusedBuf = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (new ArrayBuffer(0)));

// Pure type/identity checks (AnyPureArgs — args themselves must be pure too).
let unusedArrIsArray = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (Array.isArray([1, 2, 3])));
let unusedObjectIs = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (Object.is(1, 2)));

// String/Object with literal args — no coercion since literals don't have
// custom @@toPrimitive.
let unusedString = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (String("hello")));
let unusedObject = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (Object("y")));

// Boolean is pure regardless of arg shape (ToBoolean never throws).
let unusedBool = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (Boolean({})));
let unusedBoolVar = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (Boolean(marker)));

// Symbol() with primitive description.
let unusedSymbol = (/* unused pure expression or super */ null && (Symbol("desc")));

// === MUST be kept (throw or have side effects at runtime) ===

// `new Set(1)` throws TypeError (1 is not iterable).
let throwsTypeErrorSet = new Set(1);

// `new Map("foo")` actually throws (string iterates to chars, not [k,v] pairs).
// Even though it's a literal, the gate (NullishOrNoArgs) correctly rejects.
let throwsMap = new Map("foo");

// `new Array(-1)` throws RangeError.
let throwsRangeErrorArr = new Array(-1);

// `new Array(1.5)` throws RangeError.
let throwsArrFractional = new Array(1.5);

// `new Uint8Array(-1)` throws RangeError.
let throwsTypedNeg = new Uint8Array(-1);

// `new Uint8Array(1.5)` throws RangeError.
let throwsTypedFractional = new Uint8Array(1.5);

// `new Date(1n)` throws TypeError (BigInt → Number coercion fails).
let throwsDateBigInt = new Date(1n);

// `new Number(1n)` throws TypeError.
let throwsNumberBigInt = new Number(1n);

// Impure argument — `Boolean(sideEffect())` is pure, but the argument call
// has side effects, so the whole expression must stay.
function impureArg() { console.log("keep"); return 1; }
let unusedWithImpureArg = new Set([impureArg()]);
let unusedBoolImpure = Boolean(impureArg());

// Non-literal arg for typed array — could trigger valueOf coercion.
let dynamic = { length: 16 };
let unusedWithDynamic = new Uint8Array(dynamic);


},
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) {
"use strict";
/* import */ var _app__rspack_import_0 = __webpack_require__("./app.js");


_app__rspack_import_0.marker;


},
"./shadow.js"() {
// Shadowing: `Set`/`Map` below are LOCAL bindings, not the real globals.
// The unresolved-context check must keep these calls despite matching names.
function impureSet() { console.log("keep"); return class {} }
const Set = impureSet();
let shadowedSet = new Set();

const Map = impureSet();
let shadowedMap = new Map();


},

},function(__webpack_require__) {
var __webpack_exec__ = function(moduleId) { return __webpack_require__(__webpack_require__.s = moduleId) }
var __webpack_exports__ = (__webpack_exec__("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
